chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6463 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.120/2025 2. For hearing of main case 27.01.2026 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, Advocate for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith Mumtaz Ali Unar, Admin Officer, Local Government Board, Karachi ---------------------- Learned counsel while arguing the case has drawn attention of the Court towards prayer clause and submitted that the petitioners will be satisfied and will not press this petition if the respondent may be directed to convene the DPC and then issue fresh seniority list of the petitioners. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh records his no objection. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
